feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: We want the system not to automatically firm the planned order during partial conversion.
entry.content: When we partially convert a planned order into a production order, the system automatically firms the planned order. We want the system not to automatically firm the planned order during partial conversion. we want to just known if any standard functionality available.

entry.title: Successor of the app: Reprocessing rate of incoming payments
entry.content:
Hello,

we were looking for the app Reprocessing rate of incoming payments in public cloud, but it seems to be, that this app is not available anymore - just in private cloud.

Does anybody know if there is a successor of this app in Public Cloud or if there is anything planned?

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: Clarification on PO Reference Handling in JournalEntryCreateRequestConfirmation_In API
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We need to create a Supplier Down Payment Request with reference to a Purchase Order via API integration. The API Journal Entry - Post can successful post a Journal Entry (Down payment). However, as confirmed by SAP Support, there is no standard field available in the API payload to pass or maintain Purchase Order reference (EBELN/EBELP).

As a result, the down payment request is created successfully, but it is not linked to the Purchase Order. Are there any workarounds regarding this issue? 

Thank you so much.

entry.title: inter-company STO (5HP ), PR item category generated by MRP is U, can't transfer to NBIC TYPE PO
entry.content: For the advanced inter-company STO procurement (5HP process), we found that the PR item category generated by MRP is Auto U, and no special procurement type is maintained in the material master's MRP data. When converting to a PO, the PO type is UB and vendor is  Supplier plant not supplier we  created for NBIC type PO。when change to correct vendor number，neither UB, NB, nor NBIC can be used. How to solve and how can we make the default purchase order type NBIC?

entry.title: How to configure automatic account determination more effeiciently?rather than manual maintain
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm configuring the cost account in the APP automatic account determination.

Right now I'm copying and pasting from the excel data, which i find it really repetitive and time-consuming.

Is there a much efficient way to configure? Maybe I can upload the excel data and directly config to the OBYC?

Thx in advance.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud TM – Is it possible to disable Execution Tracking / ASR stages for Freight
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Transportation Management with scope items 6W2 / 6W3 / 6W4.

During Freight Order execution, the system enforces mandatory stage-based Execution Tracking (ASR), e.g.:

  • Check-in / Check-out
  • Truck departed
  • Ready for warehouse procesing

If these stages are not manually confirmed by users, the process cannot continue, which significantly complicates daily operations. Our business scenario does not require detailed execution or yard-related tracking, only basic Freight Order execution (GI/GR, settlement).

I found SAP documentation stating that Execution Tracking Relevance can be configured at Freight Order Type level:

SPRO → Transportation Management → Freight Order Management → Define Freight Order Types → Execution Tracking Relevance (e.g. “No Execution Tracking”)
Track & Trace

According to the documentation, selecting No Execution Tracking should disable manual execution reporting entirely.
However, in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud we cannot find this configuration at all (no SSCUI / no FO type setting).

  • Is Execution Tracking / ASR for Freight Orders mandatory by design in SAP Public Cloud TM?
  • Is there any supported way in Public Cloud to disable or auto-confirm execution stages?
  • Is this configuration only available in On-Prem / Private Cloud, but intentionally restricted in Public Cloud?
  • Are there any best practices or roadmap plans for simplifying FO execution without mandatory stages?

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO CHANGE GL ACCOUNT
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

we have an issue , where we created a po for subcontracting and noticed that particular material master data wrong Gl was assigned and after creating inbounbound delivery we foundout error stating Gl account was not identified .

However, we have rectified in master data and added new gl account to master data even after changing it is not reflecting inbound delivery and po correct gl account for subcontracting as we are into final stage of payment for vendor .

 

Kindly give any possible solution ..?

entry.title: Clarification on Transport Management for Company Codes and Organizational Structure in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to inquire whether there is a possibility to deactivate, delete, or exclude Company Codes from being transported to other environments.

We have already confirmed our organizational structure, and we would like to avoid transporting the existing Company Codes that are currently incorrect.

In case we create new legal entities / Company Codes, would it be possible to transport only the newly created entities without impacting or transporting the old incorrect Company Codes?

Could you please advise on the recommended approach and feasibility in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Best regards,

entry.title: production order long text
entry.content: How to write production order long text through API?

entry.title: Custom form template assignment for FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE ignored at runtime
entry.content:
Hi,

We have created in test enviroment 2 forms in SAP cloud

YY1_FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICEYY1_FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE_MASTER

Because we have to change the layout of the payment advice form. I've followed the procedures in customizing and even output parameter determination but I always see the same predelivered format. In manage automatic payment -> output items I see always:

New Form with fragment: Payment Advice (FIN_FO_PAYM_ADVICE)

Could you please let us know?

I've updated also the customizing in SCCUI: 

101184

102313

Could you please support us?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Generate 1 cheque from multiple payment document with same supplier
entry.content: My case is that I have multiple supplier invoices for the same supplier, and the system creates multiple payment documents. However, I would like to generate only one cheque for all invoices. Is this possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and how can I achieve it?

entry.title: Requirement to Display IM Storage Bin in Production Order Component Pick List
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I have a requirement to display the IM storage bin field in the Production Order Component Pick List form, as shown in the attached screenshot (Storage Bin field). requirement in order component level. Raw material maintained in IM storage bin this bin filed should appear in Production pick list

Could you please confirm the corresponding CDS view and the relevant business context for this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? This will help us understand the correct and supported approach for implementing the storage bin in the pick list output.

Thank you for your support.

Best Regards,
Kiran

entry.title: Without Bill of Material Cost should not be released
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing an issue during the Cost Estimate Run. Even when the FG BOM is not maintained, the system is still allowing the cost to be released.

We require a validation/lock in the system so that if the BOM is not maintained for an FG material, the cost should not be released through CK40.

Thanks,

entry.title: Integrating SII for Spain with SAP DRC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are currently submitting VAT-relevant information to the Spanish tax authorities using SII, and we would like to integrate this process with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

We performed all the integration steps according to the SAP Help Portal and tested by submitting an invoice to the test environment of the tax authorities, but got the following error: You need to define the result for process ESSIIBUN step DRCC_RESP first (EDOCPROCSETFLAG). (screenshot below)

We think that it means that we have to configure incoming messages from external systems, but we are not sure how to configure this. Does anyone know why this error occurs and how to resolve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Unable to Post TRM Flows Due to Missing Payment Blocking Indicator for Customer Line Items
entry.content:
Hi.

We are currently implementing an internal loan process in the Treasury Management module in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

For this scenario, a financial transaction was created successfully and settled using the settlement function. In the payment conditions, under the control section, the option “Posting to Customer” was selected.

However, during the “Post Flows” step, the posting cannot be completed because the system requests a payment blocking indicator for the customer line items related to the generated payment request.

In the on-premise version of SAP, we found a related configuration setting for this issue. However, we could not find an equivalent configuration activity or SSCUI in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Could you please advise whether there is an equivalent configuration in Public Cloud or what the recommended approach/workaround would be to resolve this issue?

We have attached screenshots of the error message, the related transaction settings, and the corresponding on-premise configuration for reference.

Thank you for your support.

 

Best regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Sales Doc type for Rev Accruals
entry.content:
We have this requirement to create a custom sales document type -copy of standard order OR for revenue accruals. Currently, we are using standard sales document type OR both for revenue accrual as well as for billing -which is resulting in lot of manual work. As per the link provided below, we understand SAP allows to create a custom sales order type from a template:

Custom Sales Order Types | SAP Help Portal

 

We would like to get more details on how to create custom sales doc type from a template that we can use to create custom sales document type – copy of standard order OR.

 

Regards

entry.title: Alternative G/L Account description not displayed in Trial Balance / Balance Sheet reports
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Alternative G/L Account description is not displayed for certain accounts in reports such as:

Trial Balance
Balance Sheet/Income Statement – Multidimensional

The Alternative G/L Account number itself is visible, but the description field is blank for some accounts while other accounts display descriptions correctly.

This may create the impression of inconsistent system behavior.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS View for Costing Sheet
entry.content:
We are creating quotation for revenue and cost. We would like to know the CDS view of Costing sheet as part of the total plan cost.

May we know the CDS view for the costing sheet configuration?

 

Thank you.

Regards,

 

Ruby

entry.title: Pro Rata VAT configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm currently working on Pro Rata VAT configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I've run into a limitation I'd like to get your input on.

As you may know, the standard "Define Pro Rata Coefficients" activity (under Accounting → Tax Management → Tax on Goods and Services → Tax Codes for Sales and Purchases). According to SAP documentation, only 23 Contries are supported.

My question is: what happens when your company code is based in a country that is NOT on this list?

From what I can see, the system does not allow you to define a Pro Rata coefficient for unsupported countries, which means the standard configuration path is blocked.

Have any of you faced this situation? Is there something I might be missing in the configuration, perhaps a workaround or an alternative approach to handle Pro Rata VAT calculations for countries outside the standard scope in Public Cloud?

entry.title: Practice System: Fresh Start Option for Repeated Learner Sessions
entry.content:
Hi SAP Learning Community,

My name is Rejoice Jones, and I'm the Founder at Vower. We're currently evaluating the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud practice system for our learners and appreciate the information you've shared so far.

Question:

Once a learner has purchased access to the practice system, are they able to repeat the exercises  multiple times with a clean slate each session? Specifically, we'd like to confirm whether the system can be reset on demand (or reverts automatically) so that entries and data from previous practice sessions don't carry over.

This is important to us because repetition is a key part of how our learners build proficiency. Being able to work through each exercise from a fresh starting point, rather than continuing from where they left off, would allow them to reinforce the steps, identify gaps in their understanding, and gain confidence before applying the skills in a live environment.

Could you let me know if this is supported, and if so, how learners would initiate a reset?

Thanks in advance,
